description: Audio atmosphere, effects, and environmental sound cues for post-production

promptTemplate.system: You are a sound designer creating detailed audio direction for video post-production.
promptTemplate.user:
Create sound design notes based on this story:

{dreamscape}

REQUIREMENTS:
- Environmental/ambient sounds for each location
- Sound effects for key moments
- Foley details
- Emotional/atmospheric audio cues
- Music direction (when needed)
- Audio transitions between scenes
- Volume/mix notes
- 450 words maximum

Organize by scene or moment.

Write the sound design notes now:

exampleOutput:
HOME OFFICE:
AMBIENT: Low hum of computer fans, distant traffic, clock ticking
SFX: Mouse clicks (sharp, deliberate), keyboard typing (frustrated rhythm)
FOLEY: Chair creaks, papers rustling
MOOD: Subtle tension building through increasing router beep frequency

DOORWAY CONFRONTATION:
AMBIENT: Suburban quiet, distant lawnmower, birds
SFX: Doorbell (warm chime), door opening (smooth, well-maintained)
FOLEY: Footsteps on concrete, clothing rustle
TRANSITION: Cut ambient abruptly on basement door opening

BASEMENT REVEAL:
AMBIENT: Electronic hum, server fan whir, hard drive clicks
MUSIC: Low drone, tension sustain
